description: GlutenGuard pantry ingredient database. Every item pre-verified as gluten-free (safety_tier 0). fodmap_flag indicates high-FODMAP items for users with IBS overlap. quick_start_packs defines which bulk-add packs include each item.

items.name: Turkey breast
items.note: Plain/unseasoned only. Pre-seasoned turkey may contain wheat — see product KB.

items.name: Bacon (GF)
items.note: Must be verified GF — some bacon uses wheat-based smoke flavouring.

items.name: Crab (fresh / tinned)
items.note: Real crab only — imitation crab (surimi) contains wheat.

items.name: Whole milk
items.fodmap_note: Contains lactose — FODMAP in large quantities

items.name: Heavy cream / double cream
items.fodmap_note: Low lactose — generally FODMAP safe

items.name: Greek yogurt (plain)
items.fodmap_note: Plain low-fat Greek yogurt is low FODMAP in small servings

items.name: Feta cheese
items.fodmap_note: Contains some lactose — limit to small amounts for low-FODMAP

items.name: Ricotta
items.fodmap_note: High lactose — avoid for low-FODMAP

items.name: Cream cheese (plain)
items.fodmap_note: High lactose — avoid for low-FODMAP

items.name: Chickpeas (tinned)
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP in large portions — limit to 1/4 cup for low-FODMAP

items.name: Black beans (tinned)
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — drain and rinse well; small servings only for low-FODMAP

items.name: Red lentils
items.fodmap_note: Red lentils (drained tinned) are low FODMAP in small servings

items.name: Kidney beans (tinned)
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP

items.name: Cannellini beans (tinned)
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP in large portions

items.name: GF certified oats
items.note: Certified GF oats only. Regular oats are excluded from the pantry database.

items.name: Broccoli
items.fodmap_note: Broccoli heads are low FODMAP in small portions; stalks are higher

items.name: Mushrooms
items.fodmap_note: Canned/dried mushrooms higher FODMAP than fresh

items.name: Asparagus
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — avoid for low-FODMAP

items.name: Peas (fresh or frozen)
items.fodmap_note: Small portions of garden peas are low FODMAP

items.name: Cauliflower
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — avoid for low-FODMAP

items.name: Celery
items.fodmap_note: Moderate FODMAP — limit for low-FODMAP users

items.name: Garlic
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — use garlic-infused oil instead for low-FODMAP

items.name: White onion
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — use the green tops of spring onion instead for low-FODMAP

items.name: Red onion
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP

items.name: Shallot
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP

items.name: Spring onion / scallion (green tops only)
items.fodmap_note: Green tops only are low FODMAP — the white bulb part is high FODMAP

items.name: Garlic-infused olive oil
items.fodmap_note: Safe for low-FODMAP — fructans do not transfer into oil. Perfect garlic substitute.

items.name: Fish sauce (GF)
items.note: Most fish sauces are GF but check label — some contain wheat.

items.name: Lea & Perrins Worcestershire (US)
items.note: US formulation only. UK/Canada versions contain malt vinegar.

items.name: Garam masala
items.note: Single-ingredient garam masala is GF. Spice blends risk — check 'no wheat' or certified GF.

items.name: Italian seasoning (GF)
items.note: Check for wheat starch as anti-caking agent. McCormick Italian Seasoning is confirmed GF.

items.name: Banana
items.fodmap_note: Ripe banana higher FODMAP — unripe is safer for low-FODMAP

items.name: Apple
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — avoid for low-FODMAP

items.name: Mango
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP in large quantities

items.name: Medjool dates
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP in large quantities — limit to 1-2 dates for low-FODMAP

items.name: Almonds (raw)
items.fodmap_note: 10 almonds or fewer is low FODMAP

items.name: Cashews
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — avoid for low-FODMAP

items.name: Peanut butter (GF verified)
items.note: Most pure peanut butters are GF. Check added flavours — some use barley malt.

items.name: Honey
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — substitute with maple syrup for low-FODMAP

items.name: Dark chocolate (70%+ GF verified)
items.note: Verify GF label — shared equipment is common in chocolate manufacturing.

items.name: Agave nectar
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP

items.name: Certified GF oat milk
items.note: Certified GF only. Standard oat milk excluded.

items.name: Soy milk (plain)
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP — use almond or coconut milk for low-FODMAP

items.name: Nutritional yeast
items.note: Nutritional yeast (torula-based) is GF and safe. Not the same as brewer's yeast.

items.name: Artichoke hearts (tinned)
items.fodmap_note: High FODMAP

items.name: GF beef / chicken stock (carton)
items.note: Must be verified GF. Most stock cubes and many carton stocks contain yeast extract or wheat.
